title: Minestuck Dungeons
description: This mod aims to add more variety to the medium with more structures.
body:
Adds many new structures to the medium!! Can you find them all?

This also adds.. Grist Blocks!

If you need any help, or have feedback feel free to DM me on discord! spiffo.strider

Minestuck and their required mods are needed to use this mod.

Grist Block textures by "verypersuasiveviksy" on Discord!
